message:
test(config): reject always-show-logo runtime mutation

frankenredis-gob4

files.patch:
@@ -772,6 +772,20 @@
         "value": "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'daemonize') - can't set immutable config"
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "config_set_always_show_logo_immutable",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "CONFIG",
+        "SET",
+        "always-show-logo",
+        "no"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'always-show-logo') - can't set immutable config"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "config_set_set_proc_title_immutable",
       "now_ms": 0,
